title: Cuneiform Tablet #0326: Hellenistic Astronomical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Astronomical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records astronomical matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
